ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country (approximate */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., %, number) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., hospital, vaccination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data point belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was recorded */,
  "year_week" TEXT /* Week of the year the data point was recorded (ISO 8601 format) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "lower_ci" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_ci" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance record */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the provenance record belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the provenance record belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the data was downloaded from the source */,
  "extract_date" TEXT /* Date the data was extracted from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query used to access the data point */,
  "filters" TEXT /* Filters applied to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., regression, time series) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the model was trained on */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used to train the model */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the visualization was created from */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the visualization in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the visualization in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)
